headline: How The Bread Financial (BFH) Investment Story Is Shifting With Mixed Analyst Targets And New Deals
summary: Bread Financial Holdings has seen its modeled fair value edge from US$83.53 to US$85.53, a move of about US$2.00 that captures updated assumptions in recent analyst work. That shift comes as Street price targets move in both directions, with some analysts lifting targets by roughly US$3 to US$7 while others trim them by about US$3 to US$8, reflecting an active debate over where the stock should trade. Below, you will see how to track this evolving narrative and what these changes may mean for...

headline: Tim Cook Is Leaving—and Apple Will Never Be the Same
summary: Apple was worth around $300 million when he became CEO. It’s worth more than $4 trillion today, thanks to the consumer tech ecosystem Cook established, and the recurring revenues from the iPhone.
